faqs.question: What qualifies as a plumbing emergency?
faqs.answer: Burst pipes, major water leaks, sewage backups, gas leaks, no hot water in winter, and overflowing toilets are all plumbing emergencies. If water is actively damaging your property, call us at {phone} immediately.

faqs.question: How fast can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency response and aim to have a technician at your location as quickly as possible. Our emergency leak repair team is always on standby.

faqs.question: What should I do while waiting for the plumber?
faqs.answer: Shut off the main water supply to stop the flow, turn off your water heater, and move valuables away from the affected area. If you smell gas, evacuate immediately and call from outside.

faqs.question: Do emergency plumbing services cost more?
faqs.answer: We provide transparent, upfront pricing for all emergency work — no surprise fees. Contact us and we'll give you a clear estimate before any work begins.
